name: Capitol Punishment Chili
recipeIngredient: 4 pounds Extra lean chuck, cut into 1/4 inch cubes
1 pound Extra lean chuck, cut into 1/4 inch pieces
1/2 cup Wesson oil or kidney suet
1 tablespoon Mole (powdered), also called mole poblano
1 tablespoon Louisiana Red Hot Sauce (Dulce de Chile)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, add paprika, oregano, MSG, chili powder, cumin, beef bouillon, beer, and 2 cups water. Let simmer.
2. In a separate skillet, brown meat in 1 pound or 1 1/2 pounds batches with Wesson oil or suet. Drain and add to the simmering spices. Continue cooking until all meat is done.
3. Sauté chopped onion and garlic in 1 tablespoon oil or suet. Add to the spices and meat mixture. Add water as needed. Simmer for 2 hours.
4. Add mole, sugar, coriander seed, hot sauce, and tomato sauce. Simmer for 45 minutes.
5. Dissolve masa harina flour in warm water to form a paste. Stir into the chili. Add salt to taste. Simmer for an additional 30 minutes.
6. For extra heat, add more Louisiana Hot Sauce as desired. Serve in one pot.
